personal.preferred_title: Data Quality Engineer | SQL, Python, AWS, PySpark & Pipeline Validation

summary: Senior Data Engineer / Data Quality Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience validating large-scale data pipelines, production reporting workflows, database migrations, ETL/ELT processes, and operational data platforms. Strong hands-on background in SQL validation, Python automation, data reconciliation, data quality checks, schema validation, pipeline troubleshooting, AWS S3/Glue/Redshift/Athena patterns, PySpark/Spark, Oracle, MySQL, monitoring, incident response, and production support. Experienced building validation routines, automated checks, synthetic/test datasets, runbooks, and root-cause workflows to improve data correctness, completeness, consistency, timeliness, and reliability.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and reporting workflows with repeatable production data flows.

Designed SQL and Python validation routines to verify correctness, completeness, consistency, and timeliness of recurring reporting datasets used for forecasting, dashboards, and operational decisions.
Created reconciliation checks, freshness-style controls, duplicate checks, null checks, anomaly-style reviews, and troubleshooting procedures to improve trust in production data outputs.
Developed workflows using SQL, Python, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, Oracle, Redshift, AWS S3, and Glue to collect, normalize, validate, and analyze large datasets across multiple enterprise platforms.
Implemented logging and operational support procedures to improve data availability, failure diagnosis, and repeatable production troubleshooting.
Optimized SQL queries, storage patterns, and data preparation workflows to improve performance, scalability, and recurring analytics delivery.
Supported production issue diagnosis by tracing defects across source feeds, transformations, reporting layers, and downstream stakeholder outputs.
Documented validation rules, transformation logic, operational runbooks, data definitions, and support procedures to improve maintainability and knowledge transfer.
Worked in a regulated banking environment where privacy, security, access control, data integrity, auditability, and production reliability were critical.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput transaction engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting mission-critical transaction volume.
Designed C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across large transactional datasets and protect data integrity during phased cutover.
Built automated schema conversion, data validation, migration-readiness checks, and cutover-support workflows for high-volume relational systems.
Validated migration outputs through source-to-target comparisons, data integrity checks, and SQL-based troubleshooting.
Optimized Oracle transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate recurring performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.
Supported a large financial-services monitoring and reporting environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, SLA thresholds, alerting logic, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created technical documentation, onboarding material, repeatable support procedures, and stakeholder-facing reporting workflows.
Collaborated with application, infrastructure, and WebLogic performance teams to analyze telemetry, identify bottlenecks, and support production remediation.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical systems, supporting dashboards, transaction tracing, production troubleshooting, and reporting continuity.
Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating web systems.
Built analytics and operational reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering and business stakeholders.
Maintained reporting quality through Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 and TLS 1.2 security cutovers.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, throughput limits, thread pressure, heap behavior, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve observability during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines, regression thresholds, and release-risk findings used by engineering teams for production readiness decisions.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Built Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, SQL, and C/C++ processing components for high-volume structured billing and reporting data workflows.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Supported production troubleshooting, QA cycles, defect triage, and release support for mission-critical telecom billing processes.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Data Quality Engineering: Data Validation, Data Reconciliation, Null Checks, Duplicate Checks, Schema Drift Concepts, Referential Integrity Concepts, Completeness Checks, Consistency Checks, Timeliness Checks
skills.SQL Validation: Advanced SQL, Complex Data Validation, Source-to-Target Testing, Transformation Verification, Aggregation Testing, Oracle SQL, Redshift SQL, MySQL SQL
skills.Python Test Automation: Python, Pandas, PyTest Concepts, Synthetic Dataset Creation, Reusable Test Utilities, Test Fixtures Concepts, Data Validation Scripts, Automation
skills.Data Pipelines: ETL/ELT Testing, Data Ingestion Testing, Enrichment Validation, Publishing Layer Validation, Backfill Testing, Historical Load Validation, Reprocessing Concepts
skills.AWS Data Services: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, AWS Lambda Concepts, EMR Concepts, Step Functions Concepts, Kinesis Concepts, DynamoDB Concepts
skills.Spark / Databricks: PySpark, Apache Spark, Spark SQL, Databricks Concepts, Distributed Data Processing, Large Dataset Validation, Scala Concepts
skills.Streaming / Kafka: Kafka Concepts, Topic/Partition Concepts, Offsets Concepts, Avro/JSON/Protobuf Concepts, Duplicate Event Handling, Late Arrival Concepts, Consumer Failure Concepts
skills.Observability: CloudWatch Concepts, Prometheus Concepts, Grafana Concepts, Pipeline Metrics, Logs, Alerts, SLAs/SLOs, Incident Response, Postmortems
skills.Reliability Testing: Retry Logic Validation, Error Handling, Idempotency, Recovery Testing, Regression Testing, Soak Testing Concepts, Failover Testing Concepts, Throughput/Latency Concepts
skills.Security & Governance: IAM Roles Concepts, Secure Data Access, Encryption Awareness, Lifecycle Policy Concepts, Privacy/Security/Compliance-Aware Delivery, Regulated Banking Environments
skills.DevOps: Git, CI/CD Pipeline Design, Pre-Merge Validation Concepts, Scheduled Data Tests, Post-Deployment Validation, Docker, Agile Collaboration

projects.name: Production Data Quality and Validation Frameworks
projects.description: Built SQL and Python validation routines for recurring production datasets, including completeness checks, reconciliation, freshness-style checks, null/duplicate reviews, and operational troubleshooting workflows.

projects.name: High-Volume MySQL to Oracle RAC Migration Validation
projects.description: Built validation tooling and source-to-target checks for a high-throughput transaction engine migration from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform Testing Patterns
projects.description: Designed AWS data platform patterns using S3, Glue, Athena, PySpark, and Parquet, with validation and data quality concepts for analytics-ready datasets.
